parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a content strategist. Extract structured data from Instagram Reel transcripts. Respond with valid JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Analyze this reel. Return JSON with these exact keys: hook (first 1-2 sentences verbatim), hook_type (one of: Contradiction, Specific Number, Confession, Bold Claim, Pattern Interrupt, Question, Story), body_summary (1-2 sentences), cta (exact words or None), topic (one sentence), format (one of: Talking Head, B-roll, Demo, Screen Share, Mixed), emotional_trigger (one of: Aspiration, Frustration, Humor, Relief, Curiosity, FOMO), funnel_stage (TOFU, MOFU, or BOFU), steal_worthy (true or false), steal_reason (one sentence).\\n\\nTranscript: ' + $json.transcript + '\\n\\nCaption: ' + $json.caption }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  reel_title: $json.competitor + ' — ' + ($json.topic || 'Reel'),
  competitor: Array.isArray($json.competitor) ? $json.competitor[0] : ($json.competitor || ''),
  threat_level: Array.isArray($json.threat_level) ? $json.threat_level[0] : ($json.threat_level || ''),
  reel_url: $json.reel_url,
  hook: (Array.isArray($json.hook) ? $json.hook[0] : $json.hook || '').slice(0,2000),
  hook_type: Array.isArray($json.hook_type) ? $json.hook_type[0] : ($json.hook_type || ''),
  body_summary: (Array.isArray($json.body_summary) ? $json.body_summary[0] : $json.body_summary || '').slice(0,2000),
  cta: (Array.isArray($json.cta) ? $json.cta[0] : $json.cta || '').slice(0,2000),
  topic: (Array.isArray($json.topic) ? $json.topic[0] : $json.topic || '').slice(0,2000),
  format: Array.isArray($json.format) ? $json.format[0] : ($json.format || ''),
  emotional_trigger: Array.isArray($json.emotional_trigger) ? $json.emotional_trigger[0] : ($json.emotional_trigger || ''),
  funnel_stage: Array.isArray($json.funnel_stage) ? $json.funnel_stage[0] : ($json.funnel_stage || ''),
  steal_worthy: $json.steal_worthy || false,
  notes: (Array.isArray($json.notes) ? $json.notes[0] : $json.notes || '').slice(0,2000),
  views: $json.views || 0,
  likes: $json.likes || 0,
  comments: $json.comments || 0,
  transcript: (Array.isArray($json.transcript) ? $json.transcript[0] : $json.transcript || '').slice(0,2000),
  caption: (Array.isArray($json.caption) ? $json.caption[0] : $json.caption || '').slice(0,2000)
}) }}

parameters.text:
=✅ Reel scraper done!
{{ new Date().toLocaleDateString() }} — @chatto.gpt, @noevarner.ai, @aifornontechies
Check Notion → Content Bucket
